executives.name: Anthea Bath
executives.background: Ms. Bath has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining Wesdome, she was Chief Operating Officer at Ero Copper Corp. and held various senior positions at Anglo American Platinum.

tenure_dates.title: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Jonathan Beia
executives.background: Mr. Beia is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of financial experience in the mining sector. He previously served as Vice President, Finance at Wesdome.

executives.name: Frederic Langevin
executives.background: Mr. Langevin is a mining engineer with over 15 years of experience in underground mining operations. He previously held roles at Goldcorp and Glencore.

executives.name: Michael Michaud
executives.background: Mr. Michaud has over 30 years of experience in gold exploration and mining. He has been with Wesdome since 2017.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Exploration and Resources

executives.name: Heather Laxton
executives.background: Ms. Laxton has over 20 years of experience in corporate governance and legal affairs within the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Governance Officer and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Bill Washington
executives.background: Mr. Washington has over 30 years of experience in investment banking and the mining sector.

executives.name: Brian Skanderbeg
executives.background: Mr. Skanderbeg is a geologist with over 20 years of experience and is currently President and CEO of GFG Resources Inc.

executives.name: Charles Main
executives.background: Mr. Main is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including as CFO of Yamana Gold.

executives.name: Christine Barwell
executives.background: Ms. Barwell is the Vice President, Human Resources. She has over 20 years of experience in human resources management in the mining and manufacturing sectors.

executives.name: Edie Hofmeister
executives.background: Ms. Hofmeister is an attorney with over 25 years of experience in legal and ESG matters in the mining industry.

executives.name: Louise Grondin
executives.background: Ms. Grondin has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environment and sustainability, notably at Agnico Eagle.

executives.name: Philip Yee
executives.background: Philip Yee is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in corporate finance, financial reporting, and strategic planning in the mining industry. Prior to Eldorado, he was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer at Kirkland Lake Gold.

executives.name: Warwick Morley-Jepson
executives.background: Mr. Morley-Jepson has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Kinross Gold and Gold Fields Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Warwick Morley-Jepson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Morley-Jepson has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Kinross Gold and Gold Fields Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Anthea Bath
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd.

board_of_directors.background: Ms. Grondin has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environment and sustainability, notably at Agnico Eagle.
